/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.15 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_deseq2.dir/test_deseq2_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_deseq2.dir/tests/test_deseq2.cpp.o -o test_deseq2   -L/Users/venky/Softwares/qt5-static/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/venky/Softwares/qt5-static/lib libdeseq2_statistics.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib
